item.title: Men do not want this!
item.description: A blunt take on the behaviors and attitudes that many men say instantly turn them away.

item.title: He Shouldn't Have To Read your Mind!
item.description: A reminder that communication matters because no partner should be expected to read minds.

media:content.media:description: A reminder that communication matters because no partner should be expected to read minds.

item.title: Let’s be real, women don’t care how much men “try”…

item.title: What other tips for the ladies am I missing!?
item.description: Sharing practical dating advice for women while inviting others to add the tips they think are most important.

item.title: All because he got the “wrong” flowers…
item.description: A small misunderstanding over something as simple as flowers turns into a relationship conflict that raises questions about expectations and communication.

media:content.media:description: A small misunderstanding over something as simple as flowers turns into a relationship conflict that raises questions about expectations and communication.

item.title: Women don’t understand good men
item.description: Many men feel overlooked in modern dating as their genuine intentions and efforts go unrecognized.
